sentences: The wealthy billionaire owns a luxurious yacht and travels all over the world. 那位富有億萬富翁擁有一艘豪華遊艇，環遊世界。
They spent a relaxing weekend sailing on their private yacht. 他們在私人遊艇上航行，度過了一個輕鬆的週末。
Yachting is a popular sport among the wealthy in coastal cities. 遊艇運動在沿海城市的富人中是一項受歡迎的運動。
He enjoys going yachting with his friends every weekend. 他喜歡週末和朋友們一起去玩帆船（遊艇運動）。

meaning: 遊艇駕駛者，帆船運動員
sentences: The experienced yachtsman guided the vessel through the narrow channel. 有經驗的遊艇駕駛者引導船隻通過狹窄的水道。
He has been a professional yachtsman for over twenty years. 他擔任專業帆船運動員已超過二十年。

meaning: 粗魯、粗魯、大聲或粗魯的人。
sentences: The term yahoo refers to a rough, coarse, loud or uncouth individual. 雅虎一詞指的是粗魯、粗俗、大聲或粗俗的人。
The lesson introduced yahoo as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了雅虎這個易於理解的有用術語。
He was accepted into Yale University to study law. 他被耶魯大學錄取學習法律。
The front door is secured with a high-quality Yale lock. 前門用高品質的耶魯鎖鎖著。
Yams are a healthy and delicious type of root vegetable. 山藥是一種健康且美味的根莖類蔬菜。
She added some roasted yams to the fresh garden salad. 她在新鮮花園沙拉中加入了一些烤山藥。
Stop yammering about the weather and let's go for a walk. 別再嘮叨天氣了，我們去散步吧。
He spent the entire afternoon yammering about his boss. 他整個下午都在抱怨他的老闆。
The term yang refers to the cry of the wild goose; a honk. 陽，指大雁的叫聲；一聲喇叭。
The lesson introduced yang as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了“陽”這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。
They yanked the product as soon as they learned it was unsafe. 當他們得知該產品不安全時，他們立即撤回了該產品。
People often yank when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會猛烈地撤退。
Happy New Yar! I hope you have a great one. 新年快樂（新「年」快樂）！希望你過得愉快。
She plans to travel to Europe later this yar. 她計畫今「年」晚些時候去歐洲旅行。
The kids are playing happily with the dog in the backyard. 孩子們正和狗在後院開心地玩耍。
Our new house has a large front yard with many flowers. 我們的換新家有一個種了很多花的大前院。
She bought several skeins of colorful wool yarn to knit a sweater. 她買了幾捲彩色羊毛紗線來織毛衣。
The old sailor told us a long and fascinating yarn about his travels. 那位老海員給我們講了一個關於他旅行的漫長且迷人的故事。

meaning: 雅什馬克（穆斯林婦女戴的面紗）
sentences: The woman wore a yashmak as part of her traditional attire. 那位婦女戴著雅什馬克面紗，作為她傳統服飾的一部分。
In some cultures, wearing a yashmak is a sign of modesty. 在某些文化中，佩戴面紗（雅什馬克）是端莊的象徵。
He couldn't stop yawning during the long and boring lecture. 在漫長而乏味的講座中，他忍不住一直打哈欠。
A yawn is often a sign that someone is tired or needs more oxygen. 打哈欠通常是某人疲勞或需要更多氧氣的信號。
There are 365 days in a year, and 366 in a leap year. 一年有 365 天，閏年則有 366 天。
She graduated from university last year and started working. 她去年大學畢業並開始工作。
The term yearbook refers to a reference book, published annually. 年鑑一詞是指每年出版的參考書。
The lesson introduced yearbook as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了年鑑作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The company holds a grand yearly celebration for its staff. 公司每年為員工舉行一次盛大的年度慶祝活動。
The yearly subscription fee for the magazine is fifty dollars. 該雜誌的年度訂閱費是五十美元。
The young students yearn for adventure and want to travel the world. 年輕學生嚮往冒險，想環遊世界。
She yearned to return to the small mountain village where she grew up. 她渴望（嚮往）回到自己成長的小山村。
There is a deep yearning for peace in the hearts of the people. 人們心中有著對和平的深切渴望。
She felt a yearning sadness as she looked at the old photographs. 看著舊照片，她感到一種思念的憂傷。
It took many years of hard work to achieve his goals. 他花了多年的努力工作才達成目標。
They have been best friends for over twenty years. 他們當最好的朋友已經超過二十年了。
You need to add yeast to the flour to make the bread rise. 你需要在麵粉中加入酵母以使麵包發酵升起。
Yeast is an essential ingredient in the brewing process. 酵母是釀造過程中必不可少的成分。
Don't yell at me; I can hear you perfectly well. 別對我喊；我聽得很清楚。
The coach yelled instructions to the players from the sidelines. 教練從場邊對球員們大聲喊著指令。
Sunflowers are famous for their large and bright yellow petals. 向日葵以其大而鮮艷的黃色花瓣聞名。
The taxi was painted bright yellow so it was easy to spot. 計程車被漆成鮮黃色，所以很容易辨認。
Something described as yellowish is somewhat yellow in colour. 被描述為黃色的東西的顏色有點黃色。
The word yellowish is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 黃色這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。

meaning: 突然的、高亢的噪音或話語。
sentences: The puppy let out a yelp when I stepped on her tail. 當我踩到小狗的尾巴時，小狗發出了一聲叫聲。
The term yelp refers to an abrupt, high-pitched noise or utterance. 術語「尖叫」指的是突然的、高音調的噪音或話語。
The price of the camera is fifty thousand yen. 這台相機的價格是五萬日圓。
I have a yen to travel to exotic places during my vacation. 我有渴望在假期時去異國他鄉旅行。
Yes, I would love to go for a movie with you tonight. 是的，我很想今晚和妳一起去看電影。
Yeah, that sounds like a great idea! Let's do it. 沒錯，聽起來是個好主意！我們就這麼辦吧。
I visited my grandparents in the countryside yesterday. 我昨天去探望了鄉下的祖父母。
What did you do yesterday afternoon after you finished work? 你昨天下午下班後做了什麼？
I haven't finished my homework yet, but I'm working on it. 我還沒做完功課，但我正在努力。
The best part of the trip is yet to come, believe me! 這趟旅行最棒的部分還在後頭，相信我！
Significant advances in technology have helped to increase crop yields. 科技的重大進步有助於提高農作物產量。
The government decided to yield to the protesters' demands after weeks of negotiation. 經過數週談判後，政府決定對抗議者的要求做出讓步。
Daily yoga can help to improve your physical flexibility and balance. 每日練習瑜伽可以幫助提高身體的靈活性和平衡。
She decided to join a local yoga class to reduce stress and stay fit. 她決定參加當地的瑜伽課，以減輕壓力並保持健康。

meaning: 將（某人）變成瑜伽士；引導練習瑜伽。
sentences: To yogi means to turn (someone) into a yogi; to lead into practicing yoga. 瑜伽士意味著將（某人）變成瑜伽士；引導練習瑜伽。
People may yogi in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下練習瑜伽。
She enjoys having a bowl of fresh yogurt with fruit for her breakfast. 她喜歡早餐吃一碗配有水果的新鮮優格。
Greek yogurt is a great source of protein and is good for your health. 希臘優格是蛋白質的重要來源，對健康有益。

meaning: 與役畜有關的大量工作，持續約半天；任何工作的數量或輪班。
sentences: to work two yokes 工作兩個軛
The term yoke refers to an amount of work done with draught animals, lasting about half a day; an amount or shift of any work. 「軛」一詞是指對役畜所做的大量工作，持續約半天；任何工作的數量或班次。
She carefully separated the egg yolk from the white for the recipe. 她小心地將蛋黃與蛋白分開以備食譜之用。
The soft-boiled egg had a perfectly runny and rich yellow yolk. 這顆半熟蛋有著完美的、流動且濃郁的黃色蛋黃。

meaning: 在或在遙遠但有指示的地方。
sentences: Whose doublewide is that over yonder? 那邊的雙寬是誰的？
The team responded yonder to the change. 團隊對那邊的變化做出了反應。

meaning: 球被投出，以便在擊球手的彈出摺痕處或附近彈跳。
sentences: He bowled forty-seven toe crushing yorkers that resulted in the wickets of 6 batsmen. 他擊中了 47 個約克郡球員的腳趾，導致 6 名擊球手擊中三柱門。
The term yorker refers to a ball bowled so as to bounce at or near the batsman's popping crease. 術語「約克」指的是擊球時在擊球手的彈出摺痕處或附近彈跳的球。
How are you feeling today? 你今天感覺如何？
I can help you with your homework if you need it. 如果你需要的話，我可以幫你做功課。

meaning: 你（你的，你的，你自己，你自己）
sentences: You are the most hardworking student in the entire class. 你是全班最勤奮的學生。
Please take good care of yourself during your trip to Japan. 妳去日本旅行期間請好好照顧自己。
She looks very young for her age, but she is quite experienced. 以她的年齡來說她看起來很年輕，但她很有經驗。
When I was young, I used to dream of becoming an astronaut. 當我年輕時，我曾夢想成為一名太空人。
The term younger refers to one who is younger than another. 「年輕」一詞是指一個人比另一個人年輕。
The lesson introduced younger as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「年輕」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The community center offers various activities for local youngsters. 社區中心為當地的青少年提供多樣化的活動。
Many youngsters nowadays spend too much time on social media. 現今許多青少年在社交媒體上花了太多的時間。
The organization aims to promote the development of local youth. 該組織旨在促進當地青年的發展。
He spent most of his youth traveling and exploring the world. 他青年時期的大部分時間都在旅行與探索世界。
Despite being over sixty, she still has a very youthful appearance and energy. 儘管已經六十多歲了，她仍然擁有非常年輕的外表和活力。
The company wants to project a youthful and innovative image to its customers. 該公司希望向客戶展現年輕且創新的形象。
The term yuan refers to the basic unit of money in China. 人民幣一詞是指中國的基本貨幣單位。
The lesson introduced yuan as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了元這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
To yuck means to say "yuck"; to express disgust. To yuck 的意思是說「yuck」；來表達厭惡。
People may yuck in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下感到噁心。
